cards.rulesText:
If a buffed unit you control would die, you may pay [rainbow], exhaust me, and spend its buff to heal it, exhaust it, and recall it instead. (Send it to base. This isn't a move.)
When you conquer, ready me.

effect.description: If a buffed unit you control would die, you may pay :rb_rune_rainbow:, exhaust me, and spend its buff to heal it, exhaust it, and recall it instead

cards.errata: Expanded effect to heal and exhaust before recalling

cards.name: Showstopper
